name: subroutine
description: Implementation discipline for TypeScript monorepos — one stack-aware `implement` skill (React + Hono) bound to a shared contract of type-safety, Result/unwrap, validation, and code-organisation rules. Defers to the repo's own AGENTS.md. Cross-runtime (Claude Code + Codex).

interface.shortDescription: Type-safe implementation discipline for React + Hono, bound to a shared contract
interface.longDescription: Subroutine implements your will with strict, shared discipline: type-safety (no any/as/!, ts-pattern exhaustive), the Result/ok/err pattern with boundary unwrapping, Zod validation, and named-export code organisation — applied to both React (front) and Hono (back). It explores before editing, follows the repo's own AGENTS.md over its built-in contract, and verifies via the project toolchain.
defaultPrompt: Use Subroutine to implement this React component with strict type-safe discipline.
Use Subroutine to add this Hono procedure following the Result/unwrap pattern.
